tasks.label: Frontend Dev Server
tasks.command: echo 'Waiting for npm install...' && while [ ! -f /workspace/frontend/.npm-ready ]; do sleep 2; done && echo 'Waiting for backend (port 8080)...' && while ! curl -sf http://localhost:8080/health > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done && echo 'Backend ready, starting frontend...' && cd /workspace/frontend && PORT=3000 npm run dev -- --host
